extracted_information: The web content, specifically an adolescent health brief titled 'Absence of Age Verification for Online Purchases of Cannabidiol and Delta-8: Implications for Youth Access', provides detailed findings on age verification practices for online cannabis/CBD product purchases. It highlights significant compliance failures, particularly for CBD products. The content does not specify technical solutions for age verification.

geographical_data.study_regions_cbd_delta8_purchases: 20 US states, representing all four Census regions of the United States
geographical_data.vape_shops_study_location_intoxicating_c: United States (520 vape shops, n=10 per state, n=10 in District of Columbia, n=10 in Puerto Rico)

references: H.R.2 - 115th congress (2017-2018): Agriculture improvement Act of 2018
